items.title: Belgian police arrest suspected phishing gang leader tied to $572K theft
items.summary: Belgian authorities say a European phishing gang stole over $572,000 from victims before laundering the proceeds through cryptocurrency.

items.title: Zcash’s Ironwood upgrade faces possible delay over infrastructure readiness
items.summary: Shielded Labs said exchanges, mining pools and wallets may need more time to complete Zcash’s Z3 software migration and safely prepare for Ironwood.

items.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber built a zlib fuzzing lab in a day
items.summary: We’re running Patch the Planet, an ongoing collaboration with OpenAI that pairs Trail of Bits engineers directly with more than 30 open-source projects. Its goal is to front-run a serious problem facing open-source maintainers: highly capable models like GPT-5.5-Cyber will soon c

items.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
items.summary: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
items.summary: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.

items.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
items.summary: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

items.title: Crypto bulls on firmer footing as U.S. rate-hike risk recedes
items.summary: Crypto ended the week in a more buoyant state after weak U.S. jobs data reduced the chances of a Fed interest-rate increase and Uniswap gained on a link-up with Robinhood.

items.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
items.summary: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy said he will hold bitcoin all the way down to zero after buying near $100,000.

items.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
items.summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
items.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

items.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
items.summary: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

items.title: Tokenization's next use case is personalized portfolios, NYLIM executive says
items.summary: Thomas Sy, head of multi-asset solutions at the $800-million asset manager, says blockchain can enable complex portfolio construction that's not yet possible in traditional finance.

items.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
items.summary: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

items.title: Bitcoin experts split over plan to freeze Satoshi's 1.1 million bitcoin as quantum threat grows
items.summary: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao said Satoshi Nakamoto's bitcoin should be frozen before quantum computers can steal it. Not everyone agrees.

items.title: How ethical hackers with just a $3,000 server found a flaw that could've put $70 billion in crypto at risk
items.summary: A critical flaw in the Aptos blockchain, which was patched, gave researchers a near-90% success rate at breaking a core security guarantee, with attack costs of just hundreds of dollars.

items.title: Why bitcoin's disconnect from record-high stocks won't last
items.summary: Researchers at Schwab and Hashdex said AI has diverted capital from digital assets while bitcoin continues to follow a familiar post-halving recovery pattern.

items.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows
items.summary: The TRUMP token is down 96% from its peak, and 85% of secondary market wallets for WLFI are underwater, reflecting a broader downturn in the sector.

items.title: Europe led on crypto regulation. Now implementation must match ambition
items.summary: No summary available.

items.title: EU moves to block retail investors from explosive boom of multibillion-dollar prediction markets
items.summary: The region's regulators emphasized that a product's actual function as a derivative matters more than its commercial name or labeling when assessing compliance.
